Defines a vibration pattern with a short pulse of 250 ms and strength 50.

# Purpose
The JSON configuration defines a vibration pattern named `short_pulse`. It specifies a vibration duration of 250 milliseconds, no brake duration, and a strength level of 50. The `pattern` array includes the `short_pulse` identifier, indicating the use of this specific vibration pattern.
